dna-drivers.dna.drivers.entity.title: JDBC Driver Definition
dna-drivers.dna.drivers.entity.description: Manages driver download URLs, local uploaded driver jars, and JDBC URL validation rules.

dna-drivers.dna.drivers.description.name: Display name of the driver
dna-drivers.dna.drivers.description.code: Unique business code of the driver
